stories.headline: 100+ Crypto Firms Press Senate to Mark Up Clarity Act Market Structure Bill
stories.tldr: A coalition of more than 100 crypto firms led by Coinbase and Ripple is urging the Senate Banking Committee to advance the Clarity Act this spring.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Clean SEC/CFTC jurisdiction lines unlock listings, custody, and tokenized securities pipelines that have been gated by regulatory limbo since 2022.
the_details: Letter sent April 23 names Coinbase, Ripple and 100+ signatories targeting Banking Committee markup.
Builds on the March 17 SEC-CFTC joint interpretive release establishing a five-category token taxonomy.
Pairs with April 13 SEC staff statement carving out broker-dealer relief for DeFi user interfaces.

stories.headline: Aave Bleeds $8.45B in 48 Hours as Kelp Fallout Drags DeFi TVL Down $13.21B
stories.tldr: Attackers using stolen rsETH as collateral triggered $8.45B in Aave deposit exits and a $13.21B DeFi TVL drop in two days post-Kelp hack.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Cross-chain LRT collateral just proved it can vaporize blue-chip lending TVL overnight, forcing risk teams to reprice staking derivatives.
the_details: Aave outflows totaled $8.45 billion across 48 hours following the April 18 KelpDAO drain.
Total DeFi TVL fell $13.21 billion as protocols paused rsETH markets and tightened oracle feeds.
Bloomberg reports $9 billion in net outflows from the largest DeFi lender alone.

stories.headline: BlackRock IBIT Options Open Interest Overtakes Deribit in Institutional Milestone
stories.tldr: Open interest in BlackRock's spot bitcoin ETF options surpassed Deribit's BTC options book on Friday, signaling a regulated-venue shift in derivatives flow.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: When the world's largest crypto-native options venue is outsized by a US ETF wrapper, hedging desks and prime brokers reroute liquidity toward TradFi rails.
the_details: IBIT options open interest topped Deribit's BTC OI on Friday per CoinDesk reporting.
Bitcoin holding above $77,000 and up 13% in April supports rising hedging demand.
Trump told memecoin investors the same day that crypto is mainstream and banks should drop opposition.

stories.headline: Spot Solana ETFs Cross $1B AUM With $35M Weekly Inflows in 5-Session Streak
stories.tldr: Spot Solana ETFs have surpassed $1 billion in AUM, recording $35.17M in net inflows over five consecutive positive sessions through April 21.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: SOL becomes the third asset with a billion-dollar US ETF complex, validating the layer-1 alt thesis even as the Altcoin Season Index drops 27%.
the_details: Five spot SOL ETFs hit $1B combined AUM with Goldman Sachs disclosed as a major holder.
Weekly net inflows totaled $35.17M over five straight positive sessions ending April 21.
Bitget launched a SpaceX-linked preSPAX tokenized pre-IPO product on Solana on April 21.

stories.headline: BTC-Dollar Correlation Hits -0.90, Most Extreme Inverse Move Since 2022
stories.tldr: Bitcoin's 30-day correlation with the U.S. Dollar Index has plunged to -0.90, the deepest negative reading in nearly four years.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: BTC is trading like a pure DXY hedge again, meaning macro desks can size bitcoin against currency exposure without picking sides on crypto fundamentals.
the_details: 30-day BTC-DXY correlation hit -0.90, lowest since 2022 per CoinDesk's April 24 daybook.
DXY is propped up by Strait of Hormuz oil disruption and stalled U.S.-Iran ceasefire talks.
BTC stalled near $80,000 as Pentagon-linked inflation warnings tightened financial conditions.
